findings.evidence: `rg -n "index_range_powMonoidHom_le_rank|index_range_powMonoidHom_le_of_closure_eq_top|index_range_powMonoidHom_two_le_of_closure_eq_top|units_sq_index_le" code roadmap` shows the two general lemmas are only used inside `PowMonoidHom.lean`; the roadmap target at `TauCetiRoadmap/EffectiveBounds/Targets.lean:47-55` asks only for the squaring-map index bound.
findings.fix: Make these helper lemmas `private` or otherwise hide them, keeping only the square generated-set lemma and `units_sq_index_le` public unless a named downstream target needs the general `n`-power API.
findings.issue: `index_range_powMonoidHom_le_rank` and `index_range_powMonoidHom_le_of_closure_eq_top` expose arbitrary positive-power/rank bounds beyond the roadmap's square-index surface.

summary: The target square-index API is present, but the PR also exposes broader positive-power/rank lemmas that are only proof helpers for this target.
